channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: KKR pursues $5.8 billion Steadfast Group acquisition
item.description: Private equity giant KKR is actively pursuing ASX-listed Steadfast Group, collaborating with US insurance distribution firm Amwins and bid partner Dragoneer Investment Group to take the $5.8 billion i...

item.title: ICPC probe faces scrutiny as DG calls for independent inquiry into Gbajabiamila case
item.description: Prince Ademola Adeniyi, claimed DG of the controversial Presidential Foreign Intervention Promotion Council (PFIPC), has expressed doubts about the integrity of the Independent Corrupt Practices Commi...

item.title: China Condemns Japan's Space Militarization and Neo-Militarism Concerns
item.description: China has expressed serious concerns over Japan's accelerated space militarisation following the amendment to Japan's Ministry of Defense Establishment Act. The amendment, passed by Japan's House of C...

item.title: Ukraine's drone attacks disrupt Russia's energy infrastructure
item.description: Ukrainian drone strikes have caused significant damage to Russian oil facilities, leading to fires and evacuations. The attacks targeted key infrastructure in southern Russia, including the Ilsky oil ...

item.title: Baguio Commemorates 10th Anniversary of West Philippine Sea Arbitral Ruling
item.description: Baguio City commemorated the 10th anniversary of the 2016 Hague arbitral ruling that rejected China's South China Sea claims, including areas in the West Philippine Sea. The event included a military-...

item.title: Trump criticizes media for alleged bias in Iran war coverage
item.description: President Donald Trump accused the media of attempting to undermine the United States' military campaign against Iran during an interview with Hugh Hewitt. He specifically criticized The New York Time...

item.title: Twelve Arrested in Connection with Alleged Right-Wing Terror Threat to Islamic Event
item.description: Twelve individuals have been arrested in connection with an alleged right-wing terror threat to an Islamic event at a country estate in Suffolk. Counter Terrorism Policing (CTP) confirmed the investig...

item.title: Governor Fintiri's Approach to Effective Governance and Resource Management
item.description: Governor Ahmadu Umaru Fintiri's administration in Adamawa State has focused on strategic resource management to drive development. Since taking office in 2019, the government has prioritized essential...

item.title: Justice Department shares Minneapolis shooting evidence with state authorities
item.description: The Trump administration has shared long-withheld evidence related to three shootings by immigration officers in Minneapolis, Minnesota, with local authorities. This development comes after months of ...

item.title: South Australia proposes banning sex offenders from dating apps to enhance online safety
item.description: South Australia is set to implement a groundbreaking policy that would ban domestic violence perpetrators and sex offenders from using dating apps, aiming to protect users from potential harm. The pro...

item.title: US military actions in Middle East escalate regional tensions
item.description: The United States has launched military strikes in the Middle East, escalating tensions in a region already marked by geopolitical instability. The operations, reportedly targeting Iranian assets, hav...

item.title: Adeyemi Calls for Independent Probe into PFIPC Controversy
item.description: Prince Adeniyi Adeyemi, the self-proclaimed DG of the controversial Presidential Foreign Intervention Promotion Council (PFIPC), has publicly doubted the credibility of the Independent Corrupt Practic...

item.title: Former ANC Mayor Zandile Gumede Joins MK Party as Deputy Convenor in KZN
item.description: Former Ethekwini mayor Zandile Gumede has officially joined the Umkhonto weSizwe Party (MKP), marking a significant political shift in KwaZulu-Natal. The announcement was made during a media briefing,...

item.title: Alaafin Commends Military for Successful Rescue of Oyo Pupils and Teachers
item.description: The Alaafin of Oyo, Oba Abimbola Akeem Owoade I, visited teachers and pupils rescued after 56 days in captivity following their abduction in Oyo State. During the visit, he praised the Nigerian Armed ...

item.title: Calgary Stampede Sees Slight Drop in Attendance for Second Consecutive Year
item.description: The final attendance numbers for this year’s Calgary Stampede have been released, revealing a slight decline compared to the previous year. A total of 1,411,954 attendees walked through the gates, mar...

item.title: Former eThekwini Mayor Zandile Gumede Joins MK Party Amid Legal Scrutiny
item.description: Zandile Gumede, the former eThekwini mayor and corruption-accused official, has officially switched allegiance from the African National Congress (ANC) to the uMkhonto weSizwe (MK) Party. The move com...

item.title: US-Iran Tensions Escalate as Ceasefire Falters and Housing Market Pressures Mount
item.description: The article details escalating tensions between the US and Iran following the collapse of a ceasefire agreement. US military strikes continue in the Strait of Hormuz, targeting Iran's ability to threa...

item.title: Germany donates fire engines to enhance Kilimanjaro emergency services
item.description: The Kilimanjaro Region has received two advanced fire engines from Germany's City of Marburg, including a specialized heavy rescue vehicle, to improve emergency response capabilities. The donation, pa...

item.title: Delhi court convicts ex-AAP leader Tahir Hussain in 2020 riot murder case
item.description: A Delhi court has convicted ex-AAP councillor Tahir Hussain and four others for the killing of Intelligence Bureau officer Ankit Sharma during the 2020 Delhi riots. Sharma was attacked by a mob and th...

item.title: Microsoft CEO Warns Companies About Data Risks With AI Adoption
item.description: Satya Nadella, CEO of Microsoft, has issued a warning to companies using AI, highlighting the risks of data exposure. He argues that enterprises inadvertently share sensitive business information with...
